openSprintIssues.title: [dogfood] github-mcp-server-actions_list blocked despite allow rule — MCP prefix match
openSprintIssues.technicalNote: aab.ts uses exact-match on MCP server name. Fix: change to startsWith() for mcp.call target matching. All github-mcp-server-* tools affected (actions_list, get_commit, list_commits, etc.).

openSprintIssues.title: AAB normalization failure — 3,825+ unintended default-deny decisions (KE-2 ActionContext)
openSprintIssues.technicalNote: Strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes in aab.ts before pattern matching. Classify embedded sub-operations in compound commands. Emit UnknownActionType WARNING event when action_type = unknown. Audit tool-action-map.json for missing entries. Key files: packages/kernel/src/aab.ts, packages/core/src/data/tool-action-map.json.

openSprintIssues.title: Heredoc with governance-protected path strings triggers false-positive No Governance Self-Modification
openSprintIssues.technicalNote: PR #1212 fixed quoted-arg case. Verify if commandViolation full-string includes check at definitions.ts:1229-1232 still fires on heredoc body text containing .agentguard/ paths. May be partially resolved.

openSprintIssues.title: [dogfood] $(date +format) blocked as dangerous shell expansion
openSprintIssues.technicalNote: Locate blocking source in packages/matchers/src/command-scanner.ts. Add safe read-only subshell allowlist: $(date ...), $(pwd), $(whoami), $(uname ...). May be AI safety layer — investigate first.

notableIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — 2026-03-28
notableIssues.label: priority:P0
notableIssues.note: Not kernel-code-owned. 85.7% stuck worker rate (12/14 agents). Required ops actions: git worktree prune, clean 18 dead PID files in /tmp/, fix cron collisions in server/schedule.json, verify cron daemon active, address 4x oversubscription (133 agents vs 32 max_workers).

escalations.description: Swarm health P0: 4th consecutive EM cycle unresolved. 85.7% workers stuck (12/14). Root batch failure ~01:17-01:44 UTC March 27. Human intervention required.
recommendedActions: git worktree prune (remove stale worktrees — no live processes)
Clean 18 dead PID files in /tmp/ (copilot-detached-*.pid etc.)
Fix cron collisions in server/schedule.json: 0 6 * * * and 45 */6 * * *
Verify cron daemon is active — /tmp/agentguard-runs/ absent suggests harness inactive
Address 4x oversubscription: 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers

escalationRules.notes: #1186 P0 swarm health persists 4+ cycles — ops escalation repeated. No kernel code escalations. Senior unstarted on sprint — yellow health continues.

dogfoodObservations.description: Every rtk git * and rtk gh * command in this EM run would be classified as unknown action type before the #1202 fix. The AAB normalization gap is live and affects the EM workflow itself — confirms ~700 unintended denials/day figure is accurate.

PR #1230 blocked by branch protection (HEAD behind main, no auto-merge). EM report PRs accumulate faster than they can be rebased. Consider whether EM report PRs need full CI gating — they only update state JSON files, not production code.
dogfoodObservations.suggestedFix: Option A: exempt .agentguard/squads/** from CI gating. Option B: add rebase step to EM workflow before pushing. Option C: accept manual rebase by next EM cycle.
